statement.en: Evaluating the Role of Antenatal Predictors of Postnatal Depression in Fathers: Does Relationship Quality Moderate the Risk?

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future timestamp suggesting provisional status) reporting empirical psychological research on paternal postnatal depression. The findings are data-dependent and subject to peer review validation. The moderation hypothesis (relationship quality as protective factor) is plausible but not yet established as fact. Cross-sectional/longitudinal claims require replication.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 関係の質が深いほど、父親の産後抑うつのリスクは逆数的に減衰する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの円（父と関係）が深い共鳴の橋で結ばれ、上からの圧力（リスク）が緩和される構図。
